product_overview: Web application for browsing, booking and managing rooms with role-based admin controls, multi-language support (TH/EN), payment slip upload and integrations for calendar and notifications.
core_goals: Allow customers to browse rooms, check availability and complete bookings with payment slip uploads.
Provide admin-only CRUD for rooms and bookings and system configuration (DB and payment QR).
Support Thai and English UI switching for all user flows.
Integrate booking events with Google Calendar and send notifications (LINE/Telegram) on booking/slip actions.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: User login and registration flows for customers and admin (login at /login, redirects to /). Registration captures required contact fields including phone number.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See redirect to / -> See user-specific UI (My Bookings or Admin controls)
Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message "Invalid credentials" -> Remain on /login

Navigate to /login -> Click Register button to switch to registration -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field during registration -> Fill phone number field -> Click Register/Submit -> See redirect to /login with success message

features.name: Room Booking
features.description: Browse rooms on the home page, view availability calendar, select dates and submit a booking request. Unauthenticated users are prompted to login/register before completing booking.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View list of available rooms -> Click on a room to view details -> View room availability calendar -> Select check-in and check-out dates -> Submit booking request -> See redirect to /login (if unauthenticated) -> Login -> See booking summary -> Upload payment slip -> See booking confirmation with Booking ID

Navigate to / -> View list of available rooms -> Click on a room to view details -> View room availability calendar -> Select check-in and check-out dates where check-out is <= check-in -> Click Submit booking request -> See validation error "Check-out date must be after check-in date" -> Do not create booking

Navigate to / -> View list of available rooms -> Click on a room to view details -> View room availability calendar -> Select check-in and check-out dates that overlap existing booking -> Click Submit booking request -> See popup alert "The selected dates are already booked" -> Booking blocked

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Admin-only capabilities to add, edit, delete rooms and manage all bookings. Admin actions are available after logging in as admin and are exposed on the home/admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See redirect to / -> See Admin-specific controls (Add Room button visible)
Navigate to / -> Click Add Room button (admin only) -> Fill room details form -> Upload room images -> Click Save -> See new room in list on /

Navigate to / -> Click a room -> Click Delete room -> See confirmation popup -> Click Confirm -> If room has active bookings then See error message "Cannot delete room with active bookings" -> Room not deleted
Navigate to / -> Click View All Bookings (admin) -> Click a Booking ID -> See payment slip image -> Click Edit booking -> Change dates or room -> Click Save -> See booking updated

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Toggle the application UI between Thai and English using language buttons on the home page; all visible labels and status strings should update accordingly.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click EN button to switch to English -> See UI labels and statuses updated to English
Navigate to / -> Click TH button to switch to Thai -> See UI labels and statuses updated to Thai
Navigate to / -> Click TH button to switch to Thai -> See some UI labels remain in English -> Report missing translations (fallback handling shown)

features.name: Payment & Receipt
features.description: Display payment QR during booking, accept payment slip uploads, and generate receipt with Booking ID, customer details, booking dates (dd-MM-yyyy) and hotel info.
user_flows: Complete booking submission -> See QR Code displayed -> Scan QR Code and complete external payment -> Click Upload payment slip -> Upload payment slip image -> Click Submit -> See booking confirmation with Booking ID and receipt showing dates in dd-MM-yyyy format

Complete booking submission -> Click Upload payment slip -> Upload a file with unsupported type or large size -> Click Submit -> See error message "Upload failed" or "Invalid file type" -> Remain on upload dialog

features.name: Booking History & Management
features.description: Customers can view only their bookings and receipts; admins can view and manage all bookings including cancellation and edits.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Login as customer -> Navigate to / -> Click My Bookings -> See list of own bookings -> Click Booking ID -> See receipt and uploaded slip -> Click Cancel booking -> Confirm cancellation -> See booking removed from My Bookings and dates freed
Navigate to /login -> Login as customer -> Navigate to / -> Click My Bookings -> Attempt to open booking ID not owned by the user -> See error or 403 Forbidden -> Access denied

features.name: System Configuration (Admin Only)
features.description: Admin UI for configuring persistent DB connection settings and uploading/changing payment QR code used in payment flows.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Login as admin -> Navigate to Settings (from /) -> Click Database Configuration -> Fill DB Host/User/Password/DB Name -> Click Save -> See success message "Configuration saved"
Navigate to /login -> Login as admin -> Navigate to Settings (from /) -> Click Database Configuration -> Fill invalid DB credentials -> Click Save -> See error message "Connection failed"
Navigate to /login -> Login as admin -> Navigate to Settings (from /) -> Click Payment Settings -> Upload QR Code image -> Click Save -> See QR Code updated on public booking flow

features.name: Integrations: Google Calendar & Notifications
features.description: On confirmed booking the system creates a Google Calendar event and sends notifications (LINE/Telegram) when slips are uploaded or bookings confirmed.
user_flows: Complete booking and upload payment slip -> System creates Google Calendar event with customer name and phone in description -> See event present in configured calendar
Complete booking and upload payment slip -> System sends notification to LINE and Telegram with booking details and slip image -> See success status for notification delivery in admin logs
Complete booking -> System attempts to create Google Calendar event but API returns an error -> See admin/system log entry "Google Calendar event creation failed" -> Booking still exists locally

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and registration functionality for users
user_interactions: Click Register button to switch to registration
Fill confirm password field during registration

features.name: Room Booking
features.description: Browse available rooms and book them
user_interactions: Click on a room to view details

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Admin panel for managing rooms and bookings

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Toggle between Thai and English languages
user_interactions: Click TH button to switch to Thai
Click EN button to switch to English

known_limitations.issue: Some UI elements may not be fully responsive on mobile devices
known_limitations.impact: User experience may be degraded on small screens
